question text: If a plant is exposed to more sunlight, then it will grow taller:
a: dependent; the sun, independent; the plant
b: dependent; soil type, independent; type of plant
c: dependent; the plant, independent; the sun
d: dependent; amount of sunlight exposure (hours/day), independent; plant height (cm)
e: dependent; type of plant, independent; soil type
f: dependent; plant height (cm), independent; amount of sunlight exposure (hours/day)

question text: If you listen to loud music, then your hearing can be damaged:
a: dependent; the music, independent; the person
b: dependent; level of hearing damage (audiologist's report), independent; volume of music (decibels)
c: dependent; duration of listening, independent; type of music
d: dependent; the person, independent; the music
e: dependent; volume of music (decibels), independent; level of hearing damage (audiologist's report)
f: dependent; type of music, independent; duration of listening

question text: If a student studies for a test for a longer period of time, then they will get a better grade on the test:
a: dependent; the test, independent; the student

d: dependent; the student, independent; the test
e: dependent; amount of time studying (hours), independent; test grade (percentage)
f: dependent; difficulty of the test, independent; student's intelligence

question text: If a person exercises more frequently, then they will have a lower resting heart rate:
a: dependent; the person, independent; the exercise

e: dependent; duration of exercise, independent; type of exercise
f: dependent; frequency of exercise (sessions per week), independent; resting heart rate (beats per minute)

question text: If you drink more water, then you will feel more hydrated:
a: dependent; time of day, independent; type of water

question text: If a car drives faster, then it will use more gasoline:

question text: If the temperature of the water is higher, then the sugar will dissolve faster:
a: dependent; temperature of the water (°C), independent; time it takes for sugar to dissolve (seconds)

question text: If you get more sleep, then you will feel more alert during the day:

question text: If you eat more vegetables, then you will have more energy:

question text: If you use a stronger fertilizer, then your plants will produce more fruit:
